title: Hot Girl Summer
description:
Hot Girl Summer

A dazzling celebration of summer, sequins and showgirls!

Ready for the hottest ticket of the summer?

Step into a dazzling world of glamour, laughter and unforgettable live entertainment. From beloved Broadway favourites and feel-good Motown classics to powerhouse rock anthems and chart-topping pop icons, Hot Girl Summer celebrates the music and performers that have defined generations!

Featuring spectacular costumes, stunning choreography, powerhouse vocals and hilarious comedy, this high-energy production is packed with it all, from start to finish. Expect soundtracks from legendary artists including Beyoncé, Tina Turner, Shania Twain, Lady Gaga and more, all leading to an electrifying finale guaranteed to bring the house down.

Bold, brilliant and bursting with energy – this is Funny Girls at its very best!

Key Highlights

  • Featuring hits from Beyonce, Shania Twain, Shakira, and Tina Turner!
  • Comedy twists, laugh out loud surprises and plenty of Funny Girls magic!
  • Dazzling costumes and West End-worthy choreography!
  • Finale so fierce and show-stopping, it's guaranteed to have the whole theatre on its feet!
  • Iconic Venue: Held in the glamorous 1939 Art Deco Funny Girls theatre.

This is what grinning ‘til your cheeks hurt looks like.

Location & transportation

- 5 Dickson Road, Blackpool FY1 2AX

- 2 minutes walk from Blackpool station

- Taxi rank outside

This is an experience you won’t forget!
address: Funny Girls, 5 Dickson Road, Blackpool, FY1 2AX
